title: [Snyk Code] Jinja auto-escape is set to false.
description:
## Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Plexus`
**File:** `plexus/ScorecardResultsAnalysis.py`
**Location:** line 218, column 20 to line 218, column 31
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-79
### Snippet (plexus/ScorecardResultsAnalysis.py:216-220)
```
 216 | 
 217 |         # Use Jinja2 to generate the HTML report
 218 |         self.env = Environment(
 219 |             loader=FileSystemLoader(templates_dir)
 220 |         )
```

**Issue Key:** 1f08690a-14b8-41e2-a0d5-4fa741725eb6

### Details
Jinja auto-escape is set to false.

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.
